title: MULTICULTURAL COUNSELING SERVICES - 211info
text: LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST BURNSIDE MULTICULTURAL COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides the following services: mental health counseling for individuals, families, and groups, with a focus on trauma, life transitions, grief, PTSD, depression, and anxiety. Support groups and community wellness groups. Mental health evaluations, including assessment, diagnosis, and treatment. Peer support and case management to help navigate resources. Psychiatric services, including medication management, for current clients. In-person and telehealth options are available. 2072 NE Burnside Road Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Low-income households with a focus on those who have CareOregon (OHP) Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-2:30pm Email (503) 731-9589 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 731-9589 Main phone Main phone (503) 731-9589 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service, accepts Medicaid (OHP) and sliding scale is available. Can not bill private insurances. DOCUMENTS: Proof of family size and income if applying for sliding scale AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Medicaid Recipients Case/Care Management * Medicaid Recipients Family Counseling * Medicaid Recipients Group Counseling * Medicaid Recipients Individual Counseling * Medicaid Recipients Mental Health Evaluation * Medicaid Recipients Peer Mental Health Support Services * Medicaid Recipients If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST BURNSIDE
